narrative.narrative: Gold's strength and low volatility (VIX) coupled with DXY weakness are fueling BTC's rally, mirroring the disbelief phase in August 2024, where BTC surged by 35% within a week. Despite high Fear & Greed, stay bullish but be prepared for short-term corrections.
narrative.headline: BTC's Disbelief Surge: Gold & VIX Drive Rally
